dropDTZ2BHaWdUqR8dJYllM45Q
addedBodies[]
descriptionXhargreg: ”It’s large.. yes… but not like a Moth Alpha or… those Bionic Queens… I need to study the Genetic Control Implants used on the Bionic Queens, about 8 of those should be enough, they might be useful in regulating their growth cycle… just think about the potentials here!” *Xhargregs mind floats off into his own little world… probably filled with even more gigantic wasps….*
typepickup
completeDescriptionXhargreg: ”Great! One Implant is actually enough… but I like the number 8 more… anyway return here with the implants… I need to try them right away! Hahahahehahgrh… oh and I even have a reward for you!”
majorTypestatic
